reasoning: Neither result set contains enough trustworthy, specific information from the snippets alone to answer the full query correctly. The anchor indicates the key facts should include the 10 Dec 2024 Stockholm Concert Hall ceremony, speeches by Astrid Söderbergh Widding and prize presentation speeches, invited Swedish officials/party leaders, and banquet programme details.
